Example: It is legal to drive at 18 in Taiwan.
ExampleChinese: 在台灣18歲開車是合法的。

Example: The teacher is very patient with students.
Nobody is perfect.
Always be polite to others.

Example: Children are dependent on their parents.

Example: Education is very important.

Example: He was impatient waiting in line.

Example: The painting was full of abstraction.

Example: The doctor prescribed antibiotics.

Example: Install an anti-virus program on your computer.

Example: Don't contradict yourself.

ExampleChinese: 相反地，他同意我的看法。

Example: There is a sharp contrast between the two.

Example: The decision caused great controversy.

Example: The topic is very controversial.

Example: Turn the knob counterclockwise.

Example: Sales decreased by 10% last month.

Example: Humans continue to deforest the Amazon.

Example: The weather was disadvantageous for farming.

Example: Columbus discovered America in 1492.

Example: The spy disguised himself as a tourist.

Example: The school provides free lunches.
